rows.label: qev092503_MSG0001
rows.name:
I gotta say, it looked pretty
fun. How did it feel?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0002
rows.name:
Any problems? Tell me everything down
to the tiniest detail. I need it ALL![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell them that you flew
with no problems.

rows.label: qev092503_SEL0021
rows.name: Say it's a bit difficult to control...

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0003
rows.name:
I felt like I was flying myself, and
that's just from watching you down here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0004
rows.name: You could go anywhere with that Doll![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, it was a bit difficult to control
myself, too, watching you wobble all over
the place after I worked all night![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Uh, I mean, that's
good feedback, thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0007
rows.name:
You probably just need a little
time to get used to flying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0008
rows.name:
Well in any case, you make it
back to NLA in one piece and
we'll call this a success.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0009
rows.name: Just make sure to stay focused, okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev092503_MSG0010
rows.name:
I know you'll make it
home without a scratch.[ST:wait ]
